query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'investor%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'isFounder%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'founder%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3kTaiYRMPpnS3sR.17f9e41a6e58 --database UcUrociZeo4QVAHHN9vAuZ --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND (COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'investor%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'isFounder%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE 'founder%');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_TYPE
investor_type	enum	enum('individual','collective','founder')
isFounder	tinyint	tinyint(1)
founderTitle	varchar	varchar(100)
founderOrder	int	int(11)
investorPhotoUrl	text	text
investorQuote	varchar	varchar(500)
investorBio	text	text
investorBadge	varchar	varchar(50)
investorJoinedAt	timestamp	timestamp
investorTotalInvested	bigint	bigint(20)
investorShowInWall	tinyint	tinyint(1)
